name: studio.update_site
description: Update a Studio site's top-level metadata: name, slug, plan tier, custom domain. Per-page content is NOT touched by this skill.
whenToUse: Operator renames a site or attaches a custom domain.
Upgrade/downgrade a site's plan tier via an agent-assisted flow.
Slug change coordinated with a redirects.create_redirect call for the old URL.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to edit page content — this is site-level only; use studio.update_page / studio.update_content.
Caller wants to change theme tokens — use the theme-specific skills (e.g. update_theme_tokens wrapper).
Slug collision not pre-checked — call studio.list_sites first to avoid a 409 on duplicate slug.
